import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = ""
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_ints() -> List<Int>
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    parse_line(line)
  when None
    let empty: List<Int> = []
    empty
  end
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_unique(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut unique: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if not list.contains(unique, v)
        unique = list.push(unique, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while unique.len() > 0
    match list.min(unique)
    when Some(m)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
      match list.index_of(unique, m)
      when Some(idx)
        unique = remove_at(unique, idx)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  sorted
end

fn format_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

let a = read_ints()
let b = read_ints()
mut combined = a
let bn = b.len()
mut j = 0
while j < bn
  match b.get(j)
  when Some(v)
    combined = list.push(combined, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end
let sorted = sort_unique(combined)
println(format_list(sorted))
